overview: This four-color Pauper deck leverages cheap flying creatures and efficient instant-speed spells to establish early board presence while maintaining interaction. By recycling key removal and damage spells through Kor Skyfisher, it aims to outpace opponents in the midgame and close out with direct damage or unblockable attackers. The mana base requires careful management to support the wide color requirements without stalling.
win_conditions: Unblockable flying pressure from Glint Hawk and Kor Skyfisher
Direct damage and threat removal via Galvanic Blast
Spell recursion to generate value and outlast opponents
Mana efficiency to maintain tempo across four colors

keep_criteria: Hands with a turn-one Glint Hawk or Galvanic Blast
Kor Skyfisher paired with a recycled spell target
Mana bases that hit at least two of the four colors early
mulligan_criteria: Zero lands or three+ lands with no early plays
Hands missing flying creatures or removal
Mana bases heavily skewed to one color

early_game: Prioritize playing lands and dropping Glint Hawk for immediate pressure
Use Galvanic Blast to clear early blockers or chip the opponent's life total
Hold interaction for key aggressive threats while establishing board presence
mid_game: Deploy Kor Skyfisher to stabilize the board and begin recycling Galvanic Blast
Maintain tempo by trading efficiently and keeping the opponent on the back foot
Manage four-color mana carefully to avoid clashing while casting spells
late_game: Recycle high-impact spells repeatedly to exhaust opponent's resources
Push damage with flying creatures while holding Blast for finishers or sweepers
Transition to a value grind if the opponent stabilizes, leveraging recursion

key_cards.name: Galvanic Blast
key_cards.notes: Use to clear early threats, finish games, or disrupt opponent's key plays. Prioritize holding it up for instant-speed interaction.

key_cards.name: Glint Hawk
key_cards.notes: Play on turn one to establish an unblockable attacker. Use haste to push damage immediately or force unfavorable trades.

key_cards.name: Kor Skyfisher
key_cards.notes: Deploy to stabilize and recycle Galvanic Blast or other key spells. Use its trigger strategically to maintain tempo and outvalue opponents.

sequencing_tips: Hold Galvanic Blast up for instant-speed interaction rather than casting it on your turn
Play Glint Hawk early to force blockers before dropping Kor Skyfisher
Recycle Galvanic Blast with Kor Skyfisher only when you have a clear target or need to finish the game
Prioritize mana base consistency by playing lands that support multiple colors early
Trade flying creatures efficiently to preserve board advantage while recycling spells

matchups.advice: Hold Galvanic Blast for key threats like Boros Elite or Lightning Strike. Use Glint Hawk to pressure early and force inefficient trades.
Play around Izzet Charm by keeping Galvanic Blast in hand. Use Kor Skyfisher to recycle spells and outvalue their burn package.
Apply early pressure with Glint Hawk before they stabilize. Recycle Galvanic Blast to clear their threats and close out games.
Maintain tempo with flying creatures and instant-speed removal. Use Kor Skyfisher to disrupt their board development and recycle key spells.

overview_evidence.evidence_span: Galvanic Blast, Glint Hawk, Kor Skyfisher

win_conditions_evidence.evidence_span: Glint Hawk, Galvanic Blast, Kor Skyfisher

sequencing_tips_evidence.evidence_span: Galvanic Blast, Glint Hawk, Kor Skyfisher
